description: Audit the Interphyre codebase and produce a structured improvement proposal for v0.0.2. Advisor sentence: verify or falsify that this codebase has critical gaps preventing research-grade use for LLM mechanistic interpretability experiments.
title: codebase_audit

close_reason: Module map complete: 25 modules documented with public API, deps, and observed issues. Critical bugs found in collect_data.py (wrong kwarg to InterphyreEnv), engine.py (_distance_ball_to_bar uses stale bar position), state.py (_hash_level excludes dimensions). Saved to scratch/codebase_audit/module_map.md.
description: Read every file in the repo: interphyre/ source modules, interphyre/levels/, interphyre/objects/, interphyre/render/, interphyre/interventions/, demos/, tests/, docs/, setup.py/pyproject.toml. For each module record: purpose, public API surface, internal dependencies, observed issues. Produce scratch/codebase_audit/module_map.md — one section per module. Next task (analysis) depends on this map being complete and accurate.
title: codebase_audit / scan: read all source files and build module map

description: Using the module map from scratch/codebase_audit/module_map.md, reason across 7 dimensions: (1) API design & consistency, (2) LLM tool-call interface, (3) level architecture, (4) observation space, (5) determinism & reproducibility, (6) interpretability research support, (7) docs & DX. Produce scratch/codebase_audit/dimension_analysis.md with concrete findings per dimension, citing file:line where relevant. Next task (output) depends on this analysis being complete.
title: codebase_audit / analysis: 7-dimension structured analysis

description: Using scratch/codebase_audit/module_map.md and scratch/codebase_audit/dimension_analysis.md, write the final report at results/codebase_audit/<task_id>_report.md. Structure: (1) Module Map, (2) Dimension Analysis, (3) Improvement Proposals (P0/P1/P2 tiers using the plan template), (4) Cross-Cutting Observations (3-5 paragraphs). Also write results/codebase_audit/<task_id>_summary.md. Advisor sentence: verify or falsify that this codebase has critical gaps preventing research-grade use.
title: codebase_audit / output: improvement proposals, cross-cutting observations, final report
